title: Ägarsteget.se
subtitle: AI-Driven Web System
content: Ägarsteget.se is an AI-driven project designed to facilitate business ownership transfers for small and medium-sized enterprises in northern Sweden. The project addresses a critical challenge faced by many aging business owners (such as craftsmen in carpentry or masonry) who are approaching retirement.

title: Coompass
subtitle: AI-Driven Web System
content: A free, regionally adapted AI-supported web platform that helps social enterprises and cooperatives find financing, measure social and economic impact, and develop sustainable business models.
